headline: Arete Downgrades CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) Rating to Neutral From Buy
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) is one of the 10 Best SaaS Stocks to Buy According to Reddit. On June 29, Arete analyst Ellie Kearney downgraded its rating on CrowdStrike to Neutral from Buy, setting a $730 price target on the stock, according to a report by TheFly. Based on 54 analyst ratings compiled by CNN, […]
